---
id: trigger-file-repair
title: "Trigger file repair"
description: "Triggers an ARR rescan for the file to initiate repair, setting status to repair_triggered"

hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/health/{id}/repair"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Triggers an ARR rescan for the file to initiate repair, setting status to repair_triggered
